title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 78.
content:
There was an old person of Dutton,
    Whose head was so small as a button;
    So to make it look big,
    He purchased a wig,
    And rapidly rushed about Dutton.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 78.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
